briefings.title: Briefings
briefings.subtitle: Personal recaps your assistant sends you, on your own rules.

empty.title: No briefings yet
empty.description: Create a briefing to have your assistant send you a recap — your tasks for the week, today's weather, and more.

fields.title: Title
fields.promptHint: Describe in plain language what the briefing should contain.
fields.promptPlaceholder: My tasks for the week and today's weather
fields.conditionHint: Optional. The assistant only sends the briefing when this is true — e.g. "if it rains today".

empty.title: Your shopping list is empty
empty.description: Add what you need to buy — it stays in sync across the household.

commit.title: Save “{{name}}” to stock
commit.categoryRequired: Pick a category to create the stock item.
commit.createHint: This item isn't in your stock yet — it'll be created, then the purchase recorded.
commit.restockHint: Records a purchase of “{{name}}” — restocks it and logs the expense.

common.confirmArchive: Archive this household? It will no longer be accessible.

errors.notFoundDescription: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
errors.unexpectedDescription: The app ran into an unexpected problem. Reload the page to try again.

board.name: Name
board.label: Label
board.emptyDescription: Create an electrical board to start mapping your home's electrical system.

device.title: Protective devices
device.label: Label
device.emptyDescription: Add breakers and RCDs to this board.

circuit.title: Circuits
circuit.label: Label
circuit.name: Name
circuit.emptyDescription: Add circuits protected by your devices.
circuit.emptyNoDevices: Add a protective device first before creating circuits.
circuit.phaseRequired: Phase is required for three-phase boards.

usagePoint.title: Usage points
usagePoint.label: Label
usagePoint.name: Name
usagePoint.namePlaceholder: e.g. Living room socket north wall
usagePoint.filterEmpty: No usage points match this filter.
usagePoint.emptyDescription: Track sockets and lights in your home.

link.emptyDescription: Link circuits to usage points to map your electrical plan.

lookup.placeholder: Search by label (breaker / circuit / usage point)…

meter.name: Name
meter.emptyDescription: Declare your electricity meter to start tracking consumption — manual readings or Enedis import.

tariff.title: Tariffs — {{meter}}
tariff.empty: No tariff yet. Add your kWh price to value consumption in euros.

consumption.noHourlyData: The hourly view only shows imported data (load curve). Import a file to see it.

import.title: Import data
import.mappingHint: Unrecognized format — map the columns yourself.
import.done: Import done: {{created}} points added, {{skipped}} already known.

consumption.noData: No consumption data on this period.

water.title: Water
water.emptyDescription: Enter the first reading of your water meter to start tracking your consumption.

weather.title: Weather
weather.error: Weather is unavailable right now. Try again later.

notConfigured.title: No location set
notConfigured.description: Set your home's location to see the local weather.

location.hint: Search for a city to enable the weather module for this household.

interactions.tags_help: Press Enter or comma to add a tag, then reuse suggestions when available.
interactions.zones_search_placeholder: Search by zone name or path
interactions.error_expense_amount_required: Enter an amount for this expense.
interactions.error_create_failed: Unable to add the event. Please verify fields and household context.
interactions.source_document_help: This activity will be linked to the selected document after creation.
interactions.list_empty: No activity found for this filter.
interactions.search_placeholder: Search by title, description, or tag
interactions.source_interaction_help: This task will be linked to the source event.
interactions.title: Activity
interactions.empty_description: Log a maintenance, repair, or any other activity to keep a history of your home.

tagSelector.helper: Press Enter or comma to add a tag.

documentSelector.helper: Select one or more existing documents to link to this activity.
documentSelector.upload_helper: Upload a document here and link it immediately to this activity.

zones.title: Zones
zones.empty_description: Add your first zone to start organising the spaces of your home.
zones.invalidSurface: Surface must be a non-negative number
zones.cannotDeleteWithChildren: This zone contains sub-zones. Move or delete them first.
zones.colorHelper: Select the base color for this first-level zone. Its children will automatically use lighter shades.
zones.colorRequired: Choose a color for first-level zones.
zones.deleteConfirmDescription: This will permanently delete "{{name}}". Child zones must be moved or deleted first.

photos.title: Zone photos
photos.helper: Link existing photo documents to build a visual history.
photos.empty: No photos linked to this zone yet.

detail.subtitle: Overview, photos, and activity for this area
detail.notFound: This zone could not be found.
detail.editDescription: Update the zone name, hierarchy, color, or metadata.
detail.projects_empty: No active projects for this zone.
detail.documents_empty: No documents linked to this zone yet.

tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.empty_description: Create your first task to get started.

weather.fieldNeedsDryWeatherHint: Outdoor task — we'll suggest dry days from the forecast.
weather.noDryDays: No dry day expected in the next 7 days.

trackers.title: Trackers
trackers.subtitle: Track values over time — meters, levels, weights, hours.
trackers.emptyDescription: Create a tracker to follow a value over time — meter, weight, tank level…
trackers.valueRequired: A numeric value and a date are required.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your profile and preferences
settings.displayNameDescription: Name shown to other household members
settings.displayNameHelper: Leave empty to use your email
settings.telegramDescription: Chat with the assistant from Telegram
settings.telegramConnectHint: The link opens Telegram — send the /start message that appears to finish linking your account.

pings.title: Proactive messages
pings.description: Let the assistant reach out on Telegram to ask the right question at the right time.
pings.linkFirst: Connect your Telegram account first to receive these messages.
pings.hint: Everything is off by default. The assistant never asks for data you already entered that day.

settings.inviteDescription: Enter the email address of the person you want to invite to this household. The user must already be registered.
settings.description: Manage your profile, households, and preferences.

modules.title: Modules
modules.description: Choose which modules are active for this household.
modules.hint: Disabled modules are hidden for every member (sidebar, dashboard, assistant). No data is deleted — re-enable a module to get everything back.

tutorials.title: Tutorial
tutorials.description: Learn how to use the app, module by module
tutorials.gettingStartedHint: The first key actions to set up your household.
tutorials.guidesHint: A step-by-step guide for each part of the app.
tutorials.openPageLong: Open the page this guide is about

create-zone.title: Describe your home in zones
create-zone.description: Create your rooms, floors or buildings: zones provide context across the whole app.

add-equipment.title: Add a first piece of equipment
add-equipment.description: Boiler, ventilation, appliances… register equipment to track warranty and maintenance.

first-task.title: Create your first task
first-task.description: Write down something to do, assign it and give it a due date.

log-note.title: Write a note in the journal
log-note.description: The journal keeps track of everything happening in the household.

ask-agent.title: Ask the assistant a question
ask-agent.description: Try asking "how much did we spend this month?" — it answers with sources.

invite-member.title: Invite a household member
invite-member.description: From settings, invite your family to join the household.

dashboard.title: Discover the dashboard
dashboard.intro: The dashboard gives you an overview of your household as soon as you log in.

overview.title: Read the overview
overview.body: Cards summarise each module: ongoing tasks, latest expenses, recent readings…

activity.title: Follow the activity feed
activity.body: The feed shows the latest household journal entries: notes, expenses, maintenance.

alerts.title: Keep an eye on alerts
alerts.body: The sidebar badge shows what needs your attention; the Alerts page has the details.

agent.title: Use the AI assistant
agent.intro: The assistant answers questions about your household data in plain language, with verifiable sources.

ask.title: Ask a question
ask.body: The assistant is reachable everywhere via the floating ✨ button (bottom-right), or the Agent page. Ask, for example, "which tasks are overdue?".

citations.title: Check the sources
citations.body: Every answer cites the items it used; click a citation to open the item.

web.title: Let it search the web
web.body: When available, the 🌐 button by the input lets the assistant search the internet if your household data isn't enough. It's off by default, set per conversation, and the assistant decides when to search.

context.title: Give it context
context.body: Open the assistant from a detail page: it anchors on the current item. Switch between "This page" and "Whole household", and the "What I know" panel shows what it already knows — use "Add context" to point it at another project, note or equipment.

create.title: Create from the chat
create.body: Ask "create a task…" or "note that…": the item is created immediately, with an Undo button.

memory.title: Manage memory
memory.body: The assistant remembers durable facts about you; review and delete them from the Memory page.

zones.title: Organise your home into zones
zones.intro: Zones (rooms, floors, buildings) structure navigation across the whole app.

create.title: Create your zones
create.body: Add your main rooms: kitchen, living room, garage, garden…

hierarchy.title: Build the hierarchy
hierarchy.body: Nest zones (floor → bedroom) to mirror your home.

navigate.title: Navigate by zone
navigate.body: A zone's page gathers the equipment, tasks and events attached to it.

equipment.title: Track your equipment
equipment.intro: Warranty, maintenance, history: everything about a piece of equipment in one place.

add.title: Add equipment
add.body: Fill in the name, the zone and, if you have them, the purchase date and warranty.

purchase.title: Record a purchase
purchase.body: The purchase button automatically creates the matching expense in the household journal.

history.title: Browse the history
history.body: Interventions, breakdowns and maintenance linked to the equipment show on its detail page.

electricity.title: Model your electrical installation
electricity.intro: Describe the electrical panel and track your consumption.

board.title: Describe the panel
board.body: Create the panel, its breakers and circuits, then link them to usage points.

readings.title: Enter readings
readings.body: Regularly add your meter index, or import a readings file.

analyze.title: Analyse consumption
analyze.body: Charts aggregate your readings by period to spot drifts.

water.title: Track water consumption
water.intro: Manual meter readings are enough to follow your water consumption.

readings.title: Enter a reading
readings.body: Note the date and the index in m³; regular readings give reliable curves.

charts.title: Read the charts
charts.body: Browse by period and compare consumption, just like electricity.

weather.title: Track your home's weather
weather.intro: See your home's local weather — today's conditions and a 7-day forecast.

location.title: Set your location
location.body: In Settings > your household, the “Weather location” field, search for your city to enable the module.

forecast.title: Check the forecast
forecast.body: The Weather page shows current conditions, how today evolves, and a 7-day forecast.

dashboard.title: A glance from the dashboard
dashboard.body: A weather summary appears on the dashboard — click it to open the full page.

alerts.title: Get weather alerts
alerts.body: On the Alerts page you see weather risks (frost, heatwave, wind, storm). Enable the weather ping in Settings for a proactive Telegram + bell alert.

stock.title: Manage household stock
stock.intro: Consumables and supplies: quantities, categories and expiry dates under control.

add.title: Create items
add.body: Add your consumables (pet food, bulbs, firewood…) with their unit.

quantities.title: Adjust quantities
quantities.body: Update quantities as you buy and consume; a purchase creates its expense automatically.

expiry.title: Watch expiry dates
expiry.body: Fill in expiry dates to be alerted before it's too late.

shopping.title: Keep a shopping list
shopping.intro: One shared list the whole household ticks off — free-text, from your stock, or via the assistant.

quickAdd.title: Add what you need
quickAdd.body: Type an item in the quick-add box and press Add. It appears instantly for everyone in the household.

fromStock.title: Add from your stock
fromStock.body: On any stock item, use "Add to shopping list" — the line is linked to that item and the suggested quantity refills it. Adding it twice won't create a duplicate.

check.title: Tick it off while shopping
check.body: Check an item to cross it out and move it to "Picked up". "Clear picked" empties that section (with an undo).

agent.title: Let the assistant fill it
agent.body: Just say "add coffee to the list" — the assistant adds it, links it to your stock when it recognises the name, and you can undo in one tap.

suggestions.title: Restock what's running low
suggestions.body: The Suggestions section proposes stock items below their threshold — add them in one tap, with a refill quantity prefilled.

commit.title: Log purchases back to stock
commit.body: Once shopping, tick items off then use “Save to stock” to record the purchase — it restocks the item (creating it if needed) and logs the expense.

chickens.title: Keep the chicken coop
chickens.intro: Flock register, daily egg log and cost per egg.

flock.title: Register your hens
flock.body: Create a record per hen: name, breed, arrival date.

eggs.title: Log the eggs
eggs.body: Enter the number of eggs collected each day — the history builds itself.

events.title: Record events
events.body: Care, brooding, moulting, death: each hen's record keeps its timeline.

stats.title: Track laying and cost
stats.body: Pick a period for the laying curve: un-logged days never show as 0, and the coverage rate stays visible. Cost per egg (feed + care) and an abnormal-drop alert (molt, weather) round it out.

media.title: Photos & documents
media.body: Open the Photos or Documents tab on a hen to attach before/after photos or papers (vet, invoice). Upload a new file or connect an existing one — the tab appears via the « + » menu until it holds something.

insurance.title: Track your insurance
insurance.intro: All household contracts (home, health, car…) in one place.

contracts.title: Add your contracts
contracts.body: Fill in the insurer, type, number and renewal date of each contract.

documents.title: Attach documents
documents.body: Link PDF contracts and certificates from the Documents module.

tasks.title: Manage tasks
tasks.intro: The household to-do list: assignment, due dates and follow-up.

create.title: Create a task
create.body: A title is enough; add a due date, a zone and an assignee if needed.

organize.title: Filter and organise
organize.body: Filters (to do, overdue, done…) keep the list readable.

weather.title: Plan around the weather
weather.body: Mark an outdoor task as “needs dry weather” and its detail suggests the dry days ahead.

complete.title: Complete and find again
complete.body: Check a task to complete it; the history remains available.

projects.title: Run a project
projects.intro: Renovation, purchase, holidays: follow a project end to end with budget and expenses.

create.title: Create the project
create.body: Give it a name, a description and a planned budget.

plan.title: Gather tasks and notes
plan.body: Link tasks, notes and documents to the project — the detail page only shows the tabs that have content, with a « + » menu to open the others.

photos.title: Document before / after
photos.body: In the Photos tab, upload pictures and tag them before, during or after — then open the comparator to see the transformation side by side.

budget.title: Track the budget
budget.body: Linked expenses feed the actual cost, automatically compared to the budget.

interactions.title: Keep the household journal
interactions.intro: The journal records everything that happens: notes, expenses, maintenance…

log.title: Add an entry
log.body: Create a note or an expense in seconds from the Journal page.

types.title: Pick the right type
types.body: Note, expense, maintenance… the type decides where the entry shows up (Expenses page, activity feed).

link.title: Link to context
link.body: Attach zones, documents or tasks to an entry to find it back easily.

trackers.title: Track values over time
trackers.intro: Meter readings, weight, tank level: dated value series with charts.

create.title: Create a tracker
create.body: Pick a name and a unit (kg, m³, hours…).

entries.title: Add values
entries.body: Enter a dated value at each reading; the series builds up.

charts.title: Read the trend
charts.body: The tracker's chart shows the trend; a tracker can also live inside a project.

expenses.title: Track expenses
expenses.intro: All household expenses, entered by hand or created automatically by purchases.

record.title: Enter an expense
record.body: Restaurant, gift, groceries: add a one-off expense with amount and supplier.

sources.title: Understand automatic expenses
sources.body: Stock or equipment purchases create their expense on their own — nothing to re-enter.

review.title: Analyse by period
review.body: Filter by period or by zone to see where the money goes.

documents.title: File your documents
documents.intro: Invoices, manuals, certificates: household files, linked to their context.

upload.title: Upload a file
upload.body: Import a PDF or an image and give it a meaningful title.

link.title: Link to the right object
link.body: Attach the document to a piece of equipment, a contract or a project.

find.title: Find a document again
find.body: Search and filter by type; the AI assistant can find them too.

photos.title: Browse photos
photos.intro: A dedicated view of household photos, fed by the Documents module.

browse.title: Browse the gallery
browse.body: Images uploaded in Documents automatically show up here.

add.title: Add photos
add.body: Upload your photos like any other document of type image.

directory.title: Build the address book
directory.intro: Craftsmen, neighbours, services: the household's useful contacts, shared with all members.

contacts.title: Add contacts
contacts.body: Name, phone, email, notes: create a record per person.

structures.title: Register organisations
structures.body: Companies, administrations, associations — link their contacts to them.

alerts.title: Handle alerts
alerts.intro: Alerts gather what needs your attention: expiry dates, deadlines, warranties…

review.title: Review them
review.body: The sidebar badge counts active alerts; the page lists them by type.

act.title: Act on an alert
act.body: Open the related item from the alert and fix the cause: the alert goes away.

settings.title: Configure the app and household
settings.intro: Profile, appearance, members and modules: everything is configured in settings.

profile.title: Personalise your profile
profile.body: Display name, language, light/dark theme and colour palette.

household.title: Manage the household
household.body: Invite members, manage roles, switch the active household.

modules.title: Enable the right modules
modules.body: Disable modules you don't need (chicken coop, insurance…) to lighten the navigation.

digest.title: Get your daily digest
digest.intro: Let the assistant speak first: a short daily recap of what needs your attention, pushed to Telegram.

preview.title: See today's digest
preview.body: Open the Daily digest page to preview what today's recap contains — tasks due, weather alerts, low stock and more.

enable.title: Turn on delivery
enable.body: Link your Telegram account, then enable the digest and pick the time you want to receive it each morning.

sections.title: Choose your sections
sections.body: Tick only the topics you care about. Sections for modules you don't use are hidden automatically.

budget.title: Budgets
budget.intro: Set monthly ceilings and see at a glance whether your spending stays within them.

create.title: Create a budget
create.body: Tap "New budget", give it a name (e.g. Groceries) and a monthly amount. Add a global budget to cap all your spending at once.

assign.title: Attach expenses
assign.body: When you add a manual expense, pick a budget to count it against. Expenses left unassigned show up under "Unbudgeted".

track.title: Track the month
track.body: Each budget shows spent vs ceiling with a progress bar — amber near the limit, red once exceeded. Counters reset every month.

recurring.title: Anticipate recurring bills
recurring.body: Open “Recurring expenses” from the budget page to log subscriptions, insurance and bills. See what falls due over the next 30/90 days, and confirm each occurrence in one click when paid (the amount is editable) — it lands in your journal and advances to the next date.

photos.title: Photos
photos.empty_description: Upload your first photo using the button above.
photos.upload_hint: JPG, PNG, WEBP — max 10 MB each

entity.empty: No photos yet. Upload one to document the project before and after.
entity.empty_hint: Upload a new one or connect an existing photo.

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.empty_description: Add your first contact to start building your directory.
contacts.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, email or structure…
contacts.nameRequired: Please enter at least a first or last name.

structures.title: Structures
structures.empty_description: Add your first structure to organise your contacts.
structures.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, type or website…

documents.title: Documents
documents.subtitle: Review incoming files and qualify them with the right activity context.
documents.empty_description: Upload your first file to start organising your documents.

new.title: Add document
new.subtitle: Upload a file first, then qualify it from its detail page.
new.placeholder: The upload form is being connected to the new multipart API.

detail.title: Document details
detail.subtitle: Identity, OCR, and current context for this document.
detail.placeholder: The enriched document detail view is being connected.

createActivity.title: Create an activity from this document

link.empty_hint: Upload a new document or connect an existing one.

equipment.title: Equipment

errors.zone_required: A zone is required to create an interaction.
errors.create_and_link_failed: Failed to create and link interaction.

equipment.empty_description: Add your first piece of equipment to start tracking your home appliances and tools.

hero.allClear: Everything is under control — nothing needs your attention.

insurance.title: Insurance
insurance.empty_description: Add your first contract to track policies, renewals and premiums.
insurance.dates_inconsistent: End date must be on or after start date.

stock.title: Stock

empty.items: No stock item found with current filters.

stock.empty_description: Add your first stock item to start tracking your household inventory.
stock.empty_categories_description: Create a category to organise your stock items.

fields.quantity_hint: Enter the actual amount left — no need to compute a difference.

errors.invalid: Enter a quantity of 0 or more.

consumption.not_enough_data: Not enough history yet to plot a curve. Record a purchase or an inventory.

fields.remaining_before_hint: Optional — how much was left before restocking. Feeds your consumption history.

errors.delta_required: Enter a purchased quantity greater than 0.

auth.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
auth.forgotPasswordIntro: Enter your email address. If an account exists, you'll receive a link to choose a new password.
auth.resetEmailSent: If an account exists for this email, a link has been sent. Check your inbox.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.tokenInvalid: This link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
auth.passwordResetSuccess: Password reset. You can now sign in.

projects.title: Projects
projects.delete_confirm: Delete this project? This action cannot be undone.
projects.empty_description: Manage your renovation, maintenance and other projects.
projects.zones_edit_note: Zones can be edited from the project detail page.

groups.title: Project groups
groups.empty_description: Create a group to organise your projects.
groups.delete_confirm: Delete group "{{name}}"? Projects inside will not be deleted.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.emptyDescription: You'll be notified here when something needs your attention.

invitations.title: Pending invitations
invitations.description: You have been invited to join the following households.

changelog.title: What's new
changelog.description: Features and fixes shipped to production, most recent first.
changelog.adminOnly: This page is reserved for administrators.

chickens.title: Chicken coop
chickens.description: Track the flock, egg laying, feed and care

empty.title: No hens yet
empty.description: Add your first hen to start the flock register.

eggs.stats_empty: Log a first count to see the trends.

feed.title: Feed
feed.not_linked: No feed stock item linked yet
feed.no_stock_items: No stock item yet — create one from Stock.

alerts.title: Alerts
alerts.subtitle: What needs your attention in this household.
alerts.emptyDescription: No overdue tasks, no upcoming warranty or maintenance issues.
alerts.footnote: Alerts are recomputed every time you open this view.

weather.wind: Strong wind: gusts up to {{value}} km/h

cause.unknown: Unknown cause, keep an eye · {{recent}} vs {{baseline}} eggs/day

agent.title: Agent
agent.error: Something went wrong, please try again.
agent.empty_hint: The agent searches your documents, equipment, tasks, contracts and more, and cites every source.

entity.empty_hint: The assistant already knows this item and everything linked to it — its details, documents, expenses and tasks — and cites its sources.

web_search.toggle_hint: Let the assistant search the internet when your household data isn't enough. It decides when to search.

privacy.title: Before you start
privacy.intro: The agent reads the data of your household to answer your questions. A few things to know:
privacy.point_provider: Your questions and the matching excerpts are sent to Anthropic (Claude) to generate the answer.
privacy.point_scope: Only data from your household is shared, never data from another household.
privacy.point_retention: Your conversations are saved to your account so you can pick them up later — you can delete them at any time. Usage stats (latency, success) are logged without the content of your questions.

memory.title: Agent memory
memory.description: What the assistant remembers about you across conversations.
memory.emptyTitle: The assistant doesn't know anything about you yet
memory.emptyDescription: As you chat, the assistant remembers durable facts about you (preferences, habits) to personalize its answers. You can also ask it to "remember that…".
memory.clearConfirmDescription: The assistant will forget everything it knows about you. This can't be undone.
memory.settingsDescription: Let the assistant remember durable facts about you to personalize its answers.
memory.toggleHint: When off, the assistant no longer captures or uses memories automatically. You can still ask it to remember something explicitly.

suggestions.tasks_due: What tasks are due this week?
suggestions.equipment_warranty: Which equipment is still under warranty?
suggestions.electricity_trend: Has my electricity use gone up?
suggestions.stock_low: What's running low in my stock?
suggestions.project_cost: How much did my last project cost?

context.title: What I know
context.empty: I don't have any linked context yet. Add an item so I take it into account.
context.addDescription: Search for an item (project, note, equipment…) to add to what I know.
context.searchHint: Type at least 2 characters to search.

expenses.title: Expenses
expenses.description: See where your money goes and record expenses from anywhere.
expenses.emptyDescription: Try a different period or filter, or record an expense from a stock item, an equipment, or a project.

aiUsage.title: AI usage
aiUsage.description: Calls, latency and quality of the AI features of your household.
aiUsage.ownersOnly: This page is reserved for household owners.

histogram.title: Calls per day (30 days)
histogram.empty: No AI calls over the period.

empty.title: No renovation entries
empty.description: Keep a record of what was renovated or decorated in this room.

digest.title: Daily digest
digest.description: A short daily recap your assistant sends you — so it speaks first.

delivery.title: Delivery
delivery.linkFirst: Link your Telegram account to receive the digest.
delivery.hint: Sent once a day at your local time. Nothing is sent when there's nothing to report.

preview.title: Today's preview
preview.emptyDescription: Your digest is empty right now — you'll only be pinged when something needs your attention.

budget.title: Budgets
budget.description: Set monthly ceilings and track your spending against them.
budget.emptyDescription: Create a budget to track your monthly spending.

global.heading: Global budget
global.hint: The global budget caps all your spending for the month, whether or not it is assigned to an envelope.
global.cta: Add a global budget to cap your total monthly spending.

unbudgeted.label: Unbudgeted
unbudgeted.hint: Expenses not assigned to any budget.

budget.namedExceedsGlobal: Your budgets total {{named}}, more than the global cap of {{global}}.

install.title: Install the app
install.iosInstructions: Tap Share, then “Add to Home Screen”.

recurring.title: Recurring expenses
recurring.description: Subscriptions, insurance, bills — anticipate what falls due and confirm each in one click.
recurring.emptyDescription: Add a subscription or bill to anticipate your cash flow.

confirm.title: Confirm this expense
confirm.hint: Records the expense in your journal and moves the schedule to the next occurrence. Adjust the amount if the bill changed.
